Video.summary: Jeremy hasn't seen his child in four years, but after coming clean, he wants to right the wrongs that he's done. Julie, his ex and mother of their child, doesn't buy it, claiming that he spends more time with his new girlfriends child than his own.
Video.title: Why Aren't You A Father

Image.alt: Why Aren't You A Father
Why Aren't You A Father
Why Aren't You A Father

Video.summary: Davonna believes that her husband Michael never abused her son. Her son told his dad Brandon that Michael punched him in the nose and back. Then, Evie wants to prove that she never abused her son and deserves custody of him from her mother!
Video.title: My Son Said You Beat Him

Image.alt: My Son Said You Beat Him
My Son Said You Beat Him
My Son Said You Beat Him

Video.summary: Josh constantly accuses and hits Elizabeth for cheating. Then, John gave up his womanizing ways when he met Erica, but she can’t help but wonder if he actually did! Finally, Haley cheated on Larry before, but swears she has not done it again!
Video.title: He Punches, Spits, And Cheats On You...Pick a Door

Image.alt: He Punches, Spits, And Cheats On You...Pick a Door
He Punches, Spits, And Cheats On You...Pick a Door
He Punches, Spits, And Cheats On You...Pick a Door

Video.summary: Teen Brittany's family is desperate to get her on the road to recovery from heroin addiction; Deyanna says her drug-addicted mother stole a large sum of money from her.
Video.title: Lives Destroyed By Heroin

Image.alt: Lives Destroyed By Heroin
Lives Destroyed By Heroin
Lives Destroyed By Heroin

Video.summary: TJ refuses to let Ashley see their child after a video of her blowing marijuana smoke into the baby’s face. Then, Tiffany blames Shawn for their 10 year old daughter’s smoking and wandering the streets. Can Steve intervene before it’s too late?
Video.title: Bad Mom Caught on Tape

Image.alt: Bad Mom Caught on Tape
Bad Mom Caught on Tape
Bad Mom Caught on Tape

Video.summary: Brandi and Marty have been together 5 years. Brandi's brother and her mother claim that Marty is being physically abusive and has been cheating. Plus, Jessica worries that Derwin is now cheating on her and claims that he's been abusive towards her.
Video.title: Steve, I'm Not An Abuser

Image.alt: Steve, I'm Not An Abuser
Steve, I'm Not An Abuser
Steve, I'm Not An Abuser

Video.summary: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always staying out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to stay with them just because she’s the mother of his child. Is he also cheating on her?
Video.title: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…

Image.alt: Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…
Wait! Don’t Read the Results Yet Steve…

Video.summary: Marvin believes that Ieasha, with whom he had a fling, is trying to pin her toddler on him; married Savannah fears that her baby girl belongs to her ex-boyfriend; Alexis, furious that her ex would question the paternity of their son, wants revenge.
Video.title: I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant

Image.alt: I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant
I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant
I Can't Be The Father, She Was Already Pregnant

Video.summary: Kelly's boyfriend says he has no idea how posts from him seeking sexual favors from other women got on various websites; Genesis thinks his wife cheats while he is at work.
Video.title: Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?

Image.alt: Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?
Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?
Are You Cheating Online And In Real Life?

Video.summary: Dorothy is 17 years old and has felt so uncomfortable living at home with her mom and stepdad, that she has resorted to selling her body to take care of herself. Then, Connie says her ex pressured her to get pregnant at 16 and then refused to help her support their child.
Video.title: Teen Girls In Trouble

Image.alt: Teen Girls In Trouble
Teen Girls In Trouble
Teen Girls In Trouble

Video.summary: Shelly wants to prove to her boyfriend, Joshua, that he’s the father, but she slept with another man before she conceived. Then, Lala caught her boyfriend Tymont cheating. He claims he cheated to get even with her for soliciting sex for money!
Video.title: DNA: Steve Shocked by Results

Image.alt: DNA: Steve Shocked by Results
DNA: Steve Shocked by Results
DNA: Steve Shocked by Results

Video.summary: Steve looks back at some of the more intense relationships highlighted on the show in its first 10 years.
Video.title: Shocking Relationships

Image.alt: Shocking Relationships
Shocking Relationships
Shocking Relationships

Video.summary: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her abusive boyfriend Scott. If Stephanie takes him back, Scott will continue to abuse her. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?
Video.title: How Can You Still Love Him?

Image.alt: How Can You Still Love Him?
How Can You Still Love Him?
How Can You Still Love Him?

Video.summary: Jessica can't make sense of her on again off again relationship with Wade and it's starting to drive her crazy. Wade however claims he's had nothing to do with Jessica and she's been spreading lies and stalking him for years.
Video.title: I Am Not A Stalker

Image.alt: I Am Not A Stalker
I Am Not A Stalker
I Am Not A Stalker

Video.summary: Tara’s 57-year-old mother raises her son while she lives in a van and succumbs to a severe drug addiction. While she claims she is ready for a change, her mother and young son are skeptical. Will Tara’s drive to be a better mother prove genuine?
Video.title: Crack Mom Lives in a Van

Image.alt: Crack Mom Lives in a Van
Crack Mom Lives in a Van
Crack Mom Lives in a Van

Video.summary: Eric finally won custody of her daughter and suspects his ex Brittney of neglecting her! He suspects Brittney’s boyfriend Freddy of molesting her and knows that his daughter tested positive for meth! But what will the lie detector results reveal?
Video.title: This Child Was Living in Hell

Image.alt: This Child Was Living in Hell
This Child Was Living in Hell
This Child Was Living in Hell

Video.summary: Alexus says she has had enough of her boyfriend spitting on her and hitting her; Antonio accuses his partner of cheating with everyone, from random men to his friends and family members.
Video.title: How Long Will You Let Him Treat You Like This?

Image.alt: How Long Will You Let Him Treat You Like This?
How Long Will You Let Him Treat You Like This?
How Long Will You Let Him Treat You Like This?

Video.summary: Christina has custody of her nephew and suspects he’s the product of a sexual relationship between her sister Jennifer and brother Donald. They reunited at a party and she noticed they were very flirtatious. Then, did Patrick father Ebony’s child?
Video.title: Incest: DNA Shocker

Image.alt: Incest: DNA Shocker
Incest: DNA Shocker
Incest: DNA Shocker

Video.summary: James uncovered a series of disturbing lies Shaneema told, and he now wonders if he is really her son's father; Lee wonders if his wife is still cheating on him.
Video.title: A Huge Lie Destroyed Us

Image.alt: A Huge Lie Destroyed Us
A Huge Lie Destroyed Us
A Huge Lie Destroyed Us

Video.summary: Samantha believes that her 3 year old daughter was molested by her ex-boyfriend's brother, Chad. Chad denies sexually abusing the child and even took a voice stress test to prove his innocence. Now he wants to clear his name.
Video.title: We Tested You Six Times

Image.alt: We Tested You Six Times
We Tested You Six Times
We Tested You Six Times

Video.summary: Penny fears that her 19-year-old daughter's friend may have been involved in the young woman's death; Shay accuses her cousin of sexually assaulting her at a party.
Video.title: Did A Night of Partying Lead to Unthinkable Crimes?

Image.alt: Did A Night of Partying Lead to Unthinkable Crimes?
Did A Night of Partying Lead to Unthinkable Crimes?
Did A Night of Partying Lead to Unthinkable Crimes?

Video.summary: Joe refuses to believe lie-detector test results that prove his wife has been faithful; Cassandra will not marry her boyfriend until she finds out the truth about some unusual occurrences.
Video.title: Steve, She Controls My Every Move

Image.alt: Steve, She Controls My Every Move
Steve, She Controls My Every Move
Steve, She Controls My Every Move

Video.summary: Brandon spent time in jail after being accused of sexually abusing his niece. He maintains his innocence and claims that this isn’t the first time his niece has accused someone of molestation! Was she coached by his sister’s boyfriend Billy?
Video.title: Our Brother Should Be In Jail

Image.alt: Our Brother Should Be In Jail
Our Brother Should Be In Jail
Our Brother Should Be In Jail

Video.summary: Martinique is accused of throwing her baby daughter and prostituting in front of her; Alyssa hopes that once she clears her name of cheating, her boyfriend's abuse will stop and she will get her children back from CPS.
Video.title: Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?

Image.alt: Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?
Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?
Your 4 Month Old Had 2 Broken Legs... Did You Do It?

Video.summary: Ashley’s boyfriend Tyjuan thinks his abuse is justified because he suspects her of cheating and doubts the paternity of their five kids! Then, Natasha gave birth two weeks ago, but fears that the father is her rapist and not her husband Daniel!
Video.title: 5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?

Image.alt: 5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?
5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?
5 Years of Abuse, Is He the Father?

Video.summary: Kerenina and Clay have a four-month-old son, but Clay cannot deny his suspicions that the child might actually have been fathered by their 71 year old roommate, William.
Video.title: Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?

Image.alt: Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?
Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?
Do You Really Believe That 70 Year Old Is The Father?

Video.summary: Kelsey says her husband is abusing her. Malcolm believes that Kelsey has been cheating on him since the beginning and that their two kids may belong to another man. Plus, Carrie's boyfriend Chris thinks their child belongs to her ex.
Video.title: If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen

Image.alt: If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen
If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen
If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen

Video.summary: Knowing that Kiana cheated on him while he was in jail, Brian no longer trusts her and has doubts about being the father of her son; Virginia and Xavier dated for only a month before she got pregnant and he broke up with her.
Video.title: He Gave You A "Hall Pass" Why Did You Lie?

Image.alt: He Gave You A "Hall Pass" Why Did You Lie?
He Gave You A "Hall Pass" Why Did You Lie?
He Gave You A "Hall Pass" Why Did You Lie?

Video.summary: On August 5th, Amber’s 7 month old daughter was taken by police after cigarette burns were found all over her body. Amber’s mother, Vickie, found the burns and called the police, but who actually burned her?
Video.title: 4 Suspects: Who Will Fall?

Image.alt: 4 Suspects: Who Will Fall?
4 Suspects: Who Will Fall?
4 Suspects: Who Will Fall?

Video.summary: Shanetta's boyfriend says she has been acting strangely, and he fears that their son may not be his; Tabitha's partner wants to know if the men with whom he caught her are really her family members.
Video.title: Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test

Image.alt: Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test
Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test
Stop Smoking Pot So You Can Take The Test

Video.summary: Friends Raychele and Junova deny stealing from their employer, but one of them is not telling the truth; Gabrielle suspects that her sisters stole $1,000 from her purse.
Video.title: Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?

Image.alt: Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?
Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?
Did You Steal The Money That Got Me Fired?

Video.summary: With two small children at home, Anna's severe drug addiction has led her to prostituting to feed her habit. Her mother, who's had to raise the children, is terrified for her daughter's life.
Video.title: Steve Save My Daughter

Image.alt: Steve Save My Daughter
Steve Save My Daughter
Steve Save My Daughter
